title: Crisp Slovakian Sweet Potato Wrap
description: A peppery and springy solo dinner dish featuring sweet potatoes, flambe, and pescatarian friendly ingredients, wrapped in a lotus leaf.
instructions: In a bowl, toss the diced sweet potatoes with olive oil, smoked paprika, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the sweet potatoes on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the sweet potatoes are roasting, heat the flambe sauce in a pan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked and diced shrimp to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Once the sweet potatoes are done roasting, let them cool for a few minutes.
To assemble the wraps, lay a lotus leaf flat and spoon some of the roasted sweet potatoes onto the center of the leaf.
Spoon some of the shrimp and flambe sauce mixture over the sweet potatoes.
Fold the lotus leaf over the filling to form a wrap.
